## Summary

Describe the change and its purpose.

## Upstream/downstream impact

- [ ] This is downstream-only work.
- [ ] This is an upstream sync or cherry-pick.
- [ ] This should also be proposed upstream.
- Upstream reference or base SHA (if applicable):

## Validation

List the checks actually run and their outcomes. If no checks were run, state why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed the diff and removed unrelated changes.
- [ ] I did not add secrets or personal data.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue(s), if any.

## Notes for reviewers

Call out risks, deployment considerations, follow-up work, or areas that need particular review.
